nameMeanings.name: Griffith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

en.lifeSummary: When Morgan Griffith was born about 1480, in Wales, his father, Morgan William Llewellyn Griffith, was 11478 and his mother, Rachael Morgan, was 22. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Janet.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morgan Griffith um 1480 in Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morgan William Llewellyn Griffith 11478 und seine Mutter Rachael Morgan 22. Er hatte mit Janet mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

ko.lifeSummary: Morgan Griffith(이)가 대략 1480년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morgan William Llewellyn Griffith(은)는 11478세였고, 그의 어머니 Rachael Morgan(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Janet(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.
